arts.ttl: Barcelona starlet to sign new five-year contract this week, €500m release clause included
arts.sum: In the last few weeks, Barcelona have been working hard on contract renewals. It’s been reported that agreements have been sealed with Fermin Lopez and Gerard Martin, and there will also be confirmation of Marc Bernal’s new deal too. The latter is expected to sign his contract later this week, as reported by Sport. Barcelona […] The post Barcelona starlet to sign new five-year contract this week, €500m release clause included appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Flick optimistic that Peña can remain Barcelona's starting goalkeeper in Ter Stegen's absence
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick says he’s confident that Iñaki Peña can remain the team’s starting goalkeeper in the absence of the injured Marc-André ter Stegen. Flick said Tuesday the club is not under pressure to replace Ter Stegen after he sustained a serious knee injury that will sideline him for several months.
Despite the ongoing problems between Barcelona and Nike, we have an early look at an early draft template of the Barcelona 2025-26 home strip, leaked by @memorabilia1899.

arts.ttl: “We are under no pressure” - Flick talks Barça plan to replace Ter Stegen
arts.sum: The coach was asked about the goalkeeping situation in a press conference on Tuesday and showed complete confidence in reserve shot-stopper Iñaki Peña, and said Barça will not make any moves until they are absolutely sure they need another keeper and a good option is available on the market. The likely season-ending knee surgery to starting goalkeeper and captain Marc-André ter Stegen has been a giant blow to Barcelona in what has already been a brutal start to the season when it comes to injuries, and there’s no doubt that replacing the German will be a big challenge to Hansi Flick and his staff.

arts.ttl: Important asterisk added to Barcelona goalkeeper hunt following contacts with free agents
arts.sum: Barcelona look as if they will look to sign a goalkeeper now rather than wait until January to be able to look at a larger pool than just the players out of contract currently. They may not be used much though. arts.ttl: Second goalkeeper willing to come out of retirement for Barcelona – prime candidate for club
arts.sum: Barcelona are on the hunt for another goalkeeper after the long-term injury to Marc-Andre ter Stegen, and after Claudio Bravo offered himself to his former club, a second retired goalkeeper is reportedly willing to be return to the game for a shot with the Blaugrana. arts.sum: However, the club were rocked at the weekend after Marc-Andre ter Stegen suffered a potentially season-ending knee injury during their 5-1 victory over Villarreal.
